original_question:
Buying 20 pencils, 3 erasers, and 2 notebooks costs 32 yuan; buying 39 pencils, 5 erasers, and 3 notebooks costs 58 yuan. Calculate the cost of buying 5 pencils, 5 erasers, and 5 notebooks.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
